title: Aurora, 33379, Sea Sparkles Estrella 18In, Soft Toy, Blue & Brown
features: Meet our Sea Sparkles Estrella Mermaid Soft Toy is part of Aurora's fabulous range of Mermaid soft toy collections. Every Mermaid in this range is expertly made with exquisite detailing. From graceful and elegant to playful and mischievous, there's a mermaid for everyone.

Sea Sparkles Estrella Mermaid Soft Toy measures 46cm and is recommended for 12 months+. Its tail is made of a beautiful blue-coloured tie-dyed fabric and is movable for added play value. She has gorgeous shiny, blue-coloured hair with a silver crown on the top, which will surely appeal to children.

Perfect for birthdays, holidays, or simply as a special surprise, our sparkly mermaid soft toys make a magical gift that brings joy and wonder to children and collectors alike. Create your own adventures in the Sea Sparkles World.

This Soft Toy is part of Aurora's Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hang tags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

As a leading industry expert for over 40 years, Aurora World is dedicated to creating innovative and top-quality plush products. With its adorable design and ultra-soft feel, it's more than just a toy—it's a cherished friend waiting to be loved.
